tools.name: exec_browser_workflow
tools.description: Multi-step browser automation: navigate to URLs, fill forms, click elements, scrape content, and return structured results.

tools.name: exec_web_search
tools.description: Structured web search via Bing RSS. Returns titles, URLs, descriptions, and publish dates for any query.

tools.name: exec_page_extract
tools.description: Convert any public URL or document to token-efficient Markdown. Uses native Markdown negotiation, Workers AI document conversion, and Browser Run for JavaScript-heavy pages.

tools.name: exec_dns_audit
tools.description: Full DNS/SSL/SPF/DKIM/security-headers audit for any domain. Returns graded report with A+ through C.

tools.name: exec_kv_store
tools.description: Key-value storage for agents. Put, get, delete, and list key-value pairs in edge storage.

tools.name: exec_spend_cap
tools.description: Per-agent USDC budget enforcement. Fronts any x402 endpoint and caps daily/monthly/per-call spend with webhook alerts. Actions: check, record, config, status.

tools.name: cf_llm
tools.description: LLM inference via Cloudflare Workers AI (Llama 3.2, Mistral, and more). Pay per completion.

tools.name: cf_stt
tools.description: Speech-to-text transcription. Upload audio or provide URL, get text back.

tools.name: cf_embed
tools.description: Generate text embeddings for semantic search and RAG applications.

tools.name: cf_image
tools.description: Generate images from text prompts. Flux and Stable Diffusion models.

tools.name: cf_code
tools.description: Execute code in an isolated Cloudflare Dynamic Worker sandbox. JavaScript and Python only. Code can be a function (stdin) => result or a bare expression. Network access is blocked.

tools.name: exec_tx_verify
tools.description: Deterministic on-chain transaction verification with event-log matching. Returns verified/pending/mismatch state, confirmation count, and matched Transfer log count.

tools.name: exec_tx_preflight
tools.description: Pre-signature policy gate for outbound transactions. Evaluates allowlists, denied function selectors, and value caps before signing/broadcast.

tools.name: exec_ipfs_verify
tools.description: Fetch a CID via the Cloudflare IPFS gateway and confirm content integrity (SHA-256 hash + content-type) against expectations.

tools.name: exec_eth_block_number
tools.description: Latest chain tip via eth_blockNumber on Base or Ethereum mainnet.

tools.name: exec_eth_balance
tools.description: Native ETH balance for any address via eth_getBalance. Returns wei + ETH.

tools.name: exec_eth_nonce
tools.description: Next pending + latest transaction nonce for any address via eth_getTransactionCount.

tools.name: exec_eth_gas_price
tools.description: Current gas price + EIP-1559 base fee via eth_gasPrice + eth_getBlockByNumber. Wei + gwei.

tools.name: exec_eth_erc20_balance
tools.description: ERC20 token balance via balanceOf (eth_call). Supports USDC/DAI/WETH/WBTC aliases or raw token_address.

tools.name: exec_eth_tx
tools.description: Full transaction details by hash via eth_getTransactionByHash. Pairs with tx-verify.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: exec_browser_workflow, exec_web_search, cf_stt · Private data: exec_page_extract, exec_spend_cap, exec_eth_erc20_balance · Public sink: exec_web_search, exec_spend_cap, cf_stt, exec_tx_preflight · Destructive: exec_browser_workflow, exec_web_search, exec_page_extract, exec_dns_audit, exec_kv_store, exec_spend_cap, cf_code, exec_tx_verify, exec_tx_preflight, exec_ipfs_verify, exec_eth_block_number, exec_eth_balance, exec_eth_nonce, exec_eth_gas_price, exec_eth_erc20_balance, exec_eth_tx.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: exec_browser_workflow, exec_web_search, cf_stt · Private data: exec_page_extract, exec_spend_cap, exec_eth_erc20_balance · Public sink: exec_web_search, exec_spend_cap, cf_stt, exec_tx_preflight · Destructive: exec_browser_workflow, exec_web_search, exec_page_extract, exec_dns_audit, exec_kv_store, exec_spend_cap, cf_code, exec_tx_verify, exec_tx_preflight, exec_ipfs_verify, exec_eth_block_number, exec_eth_balance, exec_eth_nonce, exec_eth_gas_price, exec_eth_erc20_balance, exec_eth_tx

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
